## Professional Summary

Lead AI Engineer at Simplify with 7+ years building production AI systems. Deep experience across LLM integration, RAG pipelines, multi-agent orchestration, fine-tuning open-source models, and computer vision. Currently leads a team of 15 AI engineers building AI agents for the software development lifecycle.

## Current Role

**Lead AI Engineer @ Simplify** (Jan 2026 – Now, Jakarta)
- Leads team of 15 AI engineers building AI agents for SDLC simplification
- Stack: LangChain, LangGraph, LLMs, multi-modal
- Manages stakeholder expectations on AI agent capabilities

## Experience

### AI Technical Lead @ PT SMART Tbk (Nov 2025 – Jan 2026, Jakarta)
Led 4-person team (2 AI engineers + 2 software engineers) on computer vision palm fruit quality assessment. Refactored loose fruit detection codebase (30% dev time reduction), automated deployment pipelines.

### AI Advisor (Part-time) @ Links (Nov 2025 – Now, US remote)
Advises engineering teams on AI prompting strategy, LLM selection, MCP server integration, and client expectations. Built AI agent systems with MCP.

### Senior AI Engineer @ Polyrific (Jul 2024 – Jun 2025, NY US remote)
- Integrated multiple LLM APIs (OpenAI, Groq, Mistral, Anthropic, Amazon Bedrock) with Gmail/Jira/Slack — 20% latency reduction
- Built multi-modal conversational chatbot with podcast-style audio + image generation (Azure TTS, Flux)
- Designed agentic memory systems (session summarization + cross-session consolidation)
- Developed PII protection mechanism (Microsoft Presidio)
- Researched open-source embeddings — 15% cost reduction
- Stack: TypeScript, Node.js, Express, Milvus, FastAPI, Docker, PostgreSQL, DALL-E, ollama, llamacpp

### Sr. Machine Learning Engineer / Data Scientist @ GDP Labs (Jun 2021 – Jun 2024, Jakarta)
- Built on-premise RAG chatbots (LangChain, LlamaIndex, ChromaDB, Flask)
- Fine-tuned Llama2 and Mistral — 60% improvement on bank project
- Implemented NER for entity anonymization before LLM API calls
- Advised AWS data analytics architecture, built MLOps on API Gateway + CloudWatch
- Researched AI observability (DeepEval)
- Fine-tuned multilingual embedding models — 15% retrieval lift
- Optimized LightGBM for ingredient prediction — 10% waste reduction
- Stack: LangChain, LlamaIndex, Flask, ChromaDB, Elasticsearch, AWS, SQL, Pandas, Docker, Pytest, Boto3, Metabase, Kubernetes, RAG, NER, Transformers, Grafana

### Machine Learning Engineer @ PT Sugihart Digital Imaji (Aug 2019 – Jan 2021)
- People density heatmap system for crowd visualization
- Real-time face recognition attendance system — <2s latency, 97%+ accuracy
- Stack: OpenCV, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Darknet, YOLO, TensorRT, DeepStream, MySQL, ONNX

### Data Scientist / Freelance (Oct 2017 – Feb 2021)
- Text ML model for news filtering — 95% accuracy
- Data clustering for campaigns (region, density, salary, religion)
- NLP transformer deployment for Nanyang Technological University Singapore (course recommendation)

**Languages:** Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, SQL

**LLM / AI:**

**MLOps:** Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, Grafana, CloudWatch

## What I'm Looking For

Senior or staff-level AI engineering roles where I can:
- Lead LLM/RAG system architecture and production deployment
- Build multi-agent and agentic workflows at scale
- Drive MLOps practices and LLM observability
- Mentor engineering teams on AI adoption
